channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 102 replies — 154.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 102 • Updated: 2026-03-05 22:57 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61924787
>>61922734
See
>>61922014

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816
Never happening

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

61934414
50x

61934942
it begins...

61935122
Toads invade shib threads because its a zero volume zero interest and zero attention, its been a shit coin since early 2023. 1.9k holders that want to kys. Lol, lmao even.

61935440
>>61931779
SHIB blessing thread anon still here, i'm still here waiting for the time and it's going to happen

61936417
>>61935122
No u. Toad holders are going to make it.

61936442
my itch is on cheese, already bottomed only upwards from here

61936453
>>61936442
No fuck off with that jeet scam. Toad is not a jeet scam it's an Israeli/US government scam.

61937292
>>61899833
Luna never got a crack last time

61937454
>>61899833
I own $10,000 worth of Shib and that pile of shit isn't going anywhere.
Once is goes 25% up I'm dumping it asap.

61937481
>>61937454
>isn't going
>once is goes
?

61937662
>>61937454
Smart. Grab a moonbag of toadkiller and prepare for the biggest dopamine rush of your life

61938369
>>61937454
I suggest not selling your entire bag because then you'll be one of those people saying they want to rope when it m00ns

61941022
>>61937662
Wen ser?

61942051
Hodl or buy more please

item.title: This wagie has escaped — 52 replies — 76.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
This wagie has escaped

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-03-05 22:56 UTC

OP

I did it anons. I escaped the wagie cage, work offered me a redundancy thinking i would say no and ask to be redployed in another shitty role.
The HR roastie was visibly shaken. "But anon, the market is tough right now!" After 15 years i have paid off all debt and saved plus will be 200k after tax redundancy.

After selling my house, this will give me enough to retire in SEA. Fuck waging.

Early replies (first 3)

61933494
>>61933477
kek

61933581
>>61933477
The Light abandons no man

61933627
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
ehhhhhhhhhh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61935716
>>61935647
Do they really let foreigners buy in those places?
Will they give me citizenship?
Are all those countries full of sociopathic emotionless corrupt people like Russians?

61935721
>>61933477
Congrats on the escape. I hope I can too but for now I’m happy some anon has freed themselves.

61935822
>>61933866
best advice in this thread
>>61933899
Check out a few different places around the world before you decide to commit to just one.
With over a million you can easily dump it into dividend/income focused ETFs and retire to a modest life pretty much anymore you want. SEA is selling yourself short.

61935846
>>61935716
>noooo people aren't smiling for no reason all the time, they're literally insane
You're not fit to live with slavs, stick to Latin America

61935869
>>61935647
lol dipshit, does all your knowledge of russia come from /pol/ and fox jews?
Every intelligent russian with money is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was, meanwhile you have turbo virgins who spend all their time crying on the internet and sucking trump's dick trying to convince you it's some white paradise.
I hope you migrate over there and get raped by an arab or central asian mongoloid.

61936723
You will love it... till you don't know what to do next. And then you'll start a bar (and usually fail like many farangs), find that you are out of money and you'll be worried what else to do
till you will be back to work.

61936931
>>61936723
There’s so many ass blasted cucks here. What do you think all the thirdies taking all the jobs do when they work in America? They send the money back home and then leave the country when they have enough to be rich and retire over there. Heaven forbid an American who actually worked for his money leaves

61936945
>>61933862
1mill is made it point for me at like lowest of standards I'd accept so yeah thats it enjoy

61937074
>>61936945
He’s not planning on living in America retard.

61937111
>>61933725
>>61933844
Thats 13 years worth of poverty wages anon. You're gonna have a bad time. Unless you plan to put it in a high yield divvy stock or savings acct and live off the interest.

61937117
>>61933862
Oh ok. Plus a mill I mean sure yeah, go nuts. Living off the interest not principal is still a good idea though. You can live like a kang... in America even in one of the poorer states, off that kind of scratch.

61937202
>>61933477
How do you even retire in sea? Won't you get scammed there?

61937294
>>61937074
Yeah with 1mill im not affording america anhwhere not that theres anything to afford here since its all shit

61937302
>>61935688
NTA, but $1500 is close to median pay in Poland after taxes.

61937315
>>61937302
What east europe places are safe to live in when you have 15k worth of electronics

61937321
>>61937202
What im wondering is how hes planning to stay there. I personally would move to sk permanently but visas are a thing. I only got eu/us nationality

61937357
>>61937315
Poland's pretty safe nowadays.

61937362
There's a bit of seething on here from the usual suspects, but thank you to the anons who support my mission live free of the zog

61937422
>>61933477
I admire your balls anon. I feel like living there would make you a target. Maybe get a guard dog.

61937534
>>61937362
Good on you escaping the cage

61937556
>>61935869
>Every paid leftist and ukrainian shill is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was,
Only paid shills would tell you this. Be careful.
> central asian mongoloid.
Don't move to Uzbekistan.

61937558
>>61933725
>>61933831
Congrats anon for escaping the cage hell, and HR roasties.

61937566
>>61933873
you better have low standards or really be open minded ,dont be an asshole to locals, good luck

61938048
>>61937294
There's plenty of places in America where you can live indefinitely off 1M. I probably live off $30K / yr and I waste money like crazy. Do you really want to be in a crowded, foreign country when shit hits the fan, OP?

61938066
>>61933477
>retire in SEA

Ya blew it

61940011
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
you live my dream
i wish you a endless stream of nice pussys

61941084
>>61933477
Finding the shady spot on this plantation is the best most of us can get.
I might be able to get a partial pension of gibs but I'll still have to work.
SEA like Singapore or Indonesia might be ok, but be careful with Philippines, they're nigger asians

61941708
>>61933477
Well done and Godspeed anon.

61942017
>>61933477
How much did they offer you

61942044
>>61940011
they aren't that nice, typically. unless by nice you mean "gotten fucked by random dick for years"

crapto is dead

Here's your 2/27: >>61913899
>Day 1650
Here's your 3/01: >>61922023

>Day 1652

61936225

61938003

ok

61938624

61939084
>>61938624
kek sounds like it will only get the pmg trannies buttmad
lets do it

61939451

61939566

There are no quality threads on biz you retard.
There are only retarded spam threads like "500k is life changing money" or "OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO" cope threads.
So we might as well have fun with these spam snail threads.

61941500

item.title: >biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to… — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to…

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-03-05 23:35 UTC

OP

>biggest oil shock since 1973
>literally the worst case economic scenario
>he STILL hasn't sold
Some people just want to lose money.

Early replies (first 3)

61942069
Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
they don't want to anger china and Europe

61942088
last time I checked bitcoin is mostly mined with clean coal and waterfall generators so tell me why it matters

61942092
May panic sell tomorrow. Already got fucked holding over one weekend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61942094
>>61942069
>just one more weekend bro

61942100
>>61942092
Should I buy in the next days after the dip?

61942108
>>61942065
But my folio is built exactly for this scenario, bobs

61942111
>>61942069

Chinese and Russian tankers are allowed to transit

61942112
>>61942069
They're already letting Chinese/Russian ships through. They're only blocking NATO ships
>don't want to anger Europe
A sentence only a European could conjure up lmao

61942120
>>61942069
>Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
Why would they? That's their biggest chip in this casino
>they don't want to anger china
Which already stockpiled lots of oil from Russia through india, aims to support Iran in the war and doesn't want the US to dictate its oil import prices
>and Europe
Sadly we're irrelevant to the world. If we didn't deindustrialize ourselves through our 20 something sanctions against Russia we might still have some say but so far all we do is suffer and not support Iran even if paid us to take the oil.

61942121
>>61942112
The EU is the second largest economy in the world retard

61942126
>>61942121
And why would Iran give a fuck about that

61942131
>>61942065
>The supply decreasing will make the price crash!!!
....What?

61942136
>>61942131
>Supply decreases
>Buyers will lose economic power as they required the good in order to have economic growth
>Demand reduces

61942145
>>61942065
The US is not dependent on middle east oil any more like in 1973

61942178
>>61942136
>Picre
It's what happened to the price of oil in 1973.
You're acting like no one has oil reserves and that suddenly one strait being closed means everyone has zero oil. It's dumb as shit. The US has like 10+ years of oil on reserve. Britain has 5 years on reserve, etc.

Not only that, but if the good is REQUIRED to have economic growth, that is demand. Doofus ass. You're just describing a massive bull market for oil because the supply is reducing AND the ability to acquire it is getting harder. Which means people will pay more for it because they NEED it to keep everything moving.
DOOFUS.
ASS.

item.title: Day 1 of snailposting every day until JASMY is at $1 — 16 replies — 36.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1 of snailposting every day until JASMY is at $1

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-05 23:10 UTC

OP

Day 1 of snailposting every day until JASMY is at $1

Early replies (first 3)

61934693
jasmy

61935114
>>61934344
10m jasmy daimyo here
2 words
Apple partnership
I've been stacking since 2023

61935154
based

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61935550
ohh jasmy

61935609
>>61935597
uhhhhhh what is this

61935646
>>61935609
>Jasmy now has a compliant domestic payment rail through its collaboration with Aplix Corporation, which was licensed by Japan’s Financial Services Agency to issue electronic money. This doesn’t confirm that JPYD is launched or that it is a bank-backed stablecoin, but it establishes the legal infrastructure needed to build and deploy regulated digital payments (wallets, merchant payments, local government programs, etc.) that could later integrate blockchain settlement. In short: Jasmy gains regulatory groundwork for real payment infrastructure in Japan, but the exact structure of JPYD is still unknown.

61935684
>>61935646
sounds interesting especially considering mcap is low rn
would this actually go to the token though? I thought the token was supposed to be for iot? I don't even remember anymore it's been years since I sold.

61936773
JASMY

61937984
>>61935114
>>61935684
good questions. Is apple buying jasms or not?

61938015
>>61935114
AI chatbots tell me that big companies are using Jasmy for "data lockers"... where is the evidence they are buying and pumping price?

item.title: BTC: $1M or nothing? — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC: $1M or nothing?

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-05 23:23 UTC

OP

Michael Saylor still mega-bullish. Also, active traders keep getting rekt while holders just chill stacking. BTC keeps holding green despite war and macro chaos.
If it hits zero…I'm cutting my big d***.

61938729
>>61938696
cutting your big dorky?
